name: kaggle-collect-profile
title: Kaggle - Collect Member Profile
description: Child workflow spawned once per team member. The member self-reports strengths, weaknesses, interests, and current availability. Read back by the parent's collect_profiles step.
preamble:
## Domain Context
One team member fills in their own profile for Kaggle competition planning. Availability is the self-reported workload signal used later to pick a non-overloaded reviewer.

triggerInput.name: userId
triggerInput.description: User id of the member who should fill in this profile (set by the parent spawn).

steps.name: Provide Your Profile
steps.description: Describe your strengths, weaknesses, interests, and current availability for Kaggle work.

params.name: strengths
params.description: Your technical strengths (e.g. computer vision, NLP, tabular ML, feature engineering, MLOps).

params.name: weaknesses
params.description: Areas you are weaker in or want to avoid.

params.name: interests
params.description: Problem domains / competition types you find motivating.

params.name: availability
params.description: Your current availability / workload. low = overloaded.
